title: Restoration of Certificate of Registration of one NBFC by RBI
description: The Certificate of Registration issued to the following Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) has been restored after considering the orders passed by the Appellate Authority/Courts. The NBFC is advised to adhere to the applicable provisions of the RBI Act, 1934, and guidelines/directions issued by the RBI including reporting requirements. Sr. No Name of the Company Registered Office Address CoR No. CoR restored on 1 Krishna Capfin Limited Padmalaya, 506, Nemi Sagar, Vaishali Nagar, Jaipur-302021
